category: Legacy Code Documentation & AI-Powered Code Analysis

competitors.name: Fujitsu Application Transform
competitors.pricing: Enterprise SaaS (contact for pricing); Japan-first, launched March 2026
competitors.keyDifference: COBOL-only design document generation with Knowledge Graph RAG; no structured JSON output or multi-language support
competitors.notes: Claims 97% reduction in document generation time. Plans to add code rebuilding in fiscal 2026. Japan market first.

competitors.name: CodeAura
competitors.keyDifference: COBOL-only with compliance reporting (HIPAA, GDPR); outputs PDF/Markdown/wiki but not structured JSON with MCP integration
competitors.notes: Integrates with JIRA, Confluence, GitHub. Includes sequence diagrams and code flow visualization.

competitors.name: iBEAM IntDoc (OptiSol)
competitors.pricing: Tool license, co-execution, or fully managed delivery (contact for pricing)
competitors.keyDifference: Services-heavy approach requiring human reviewers; AutoDocJson is fully automated with no manual intervention
competitors.notes: Claims 3X faster than manual documentation. Three engagement models available.

competitors.name: CobolBreaker
competitors.keyDifference: COBOL-only migration-focused ETL pipeline; lacks multi-language support and structured JSON output
competitors.notes: Uses ANTLR4 parsing + LLM enrichment + MermaidJS. Open source but immature (created January 2026).

competitors.name: COBOLpro
competitors.keyDifference: Deterministic COBOL-only analysis without AI enrichment; no MCP integration or multi-language support
competitors.notes: ANTLR-based parsing for business rule extraction and dependency mapping.
